lines.speaker: Ur-lun
lines.text: At the next council meeting, I'm going to recommend that we change the guards' uniform to be red.

lines.speaker: Ur-pel
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: Ur-lun
lines.text: We have surface-dwellers coming down into our mines and our city now, and remember that they don't have very good eyesight.

lines.speaker: Ur-lun
lines.text: I worry that they can't see our guards very clearly in the dark. It is important for a guard to be seen.

lines.speaker: Ur-pel
lines.text: You have a point. But I don't think red would be the best colour. It is the colour of blood, so it might give the wrong impression.

lines.speaker: Ur-lun
lines.text: What colour do you suggest, then?

lines.speaker: Ur-pel
lines.text: I suggest green. I have heard that the plants that grow on the surface are mostly green, so surface-dwellers might find that colour soothing.

lines.speaker: Ur-lun
lines.text: No, I disagree. Guards should not be soothing, they should be seen as formidable. Red will give the correct impression.

lines.speaker: Ur-pel
lines.text: Oh, hello surface-dweller. We were just discussing some council business.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you want me to pick an armour colour for you?

lines.speaker: Ur-lun
lines.text: No, thank you. We don't let any one single goblin make decisions, and certainly not an outsider!

lines.speaker: Ur-pel
lines.text: But we could do with an opinion. What colour do you think is best?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Red.

lines.speaker: Ur-lun
lines.text: Thank you, surface-dweller. That's what I'll be recommending in the next meeting.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Green.

lines.speaker: Ur-pel
lines.text: Thank you, surface-dweller. That's what I'll be recommending in the next meeting.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think the guards are fine as they are.

lines.speaker: Ur-lun
lines.text: Perhaps you're right. Not making any change would certainly be the easiest option!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I've been here before...

lines.speaker: Ur-lun
lines.text: Oh? How so?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: This is a lot like a conversation I had with some goblins on the surface.

lines.speaker: Ur-pel
lines.text: Really? Which armour colour did they pick?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: They ended up with the same armour colour that they started with!

lines.speaker: Ur-lun
lines.text: You know, I think that's probably what we'll end up doing.
